appsync.resolver.cachingconfig.CachingKe.Description: The caching keys for a resolver that has caching activated.  Valid values are entries from the `$context.arguments`, `$context.source`, and `$context.identity` maps.

appsync.resolver.cachingconfig.Ttl.Description: The TTL in seconds for a resolver that has caching activated.  Valid values are 1–3,600 seconds.
